sentences.arabic: يَتَمَيَّزُ المَطْبَخُ العَرَبِيُّ بِتَنَوُّعِ الأَطْبَاقِ وَاللَّذَاذَةِ.
sentences.translation: Arapska kuhinja se odlikuje raznolikošću jela i ukusnošću.
sentences.translationEn: Arab cuisine is characterized by a variety of dishes and deliciousness.

sentences.arabic: يُعَدُّ الكُسْكُسِيُّ وَالمَنْسَفُ مِنْ أَشْهَرِ المَأْكُولَاتِ الشَّعْبِيَّةِ.
sentences.translation: Kuskus i mansaf se ubrajaju u najpoznatija narodna jela.
sentences.translationEn: Couscous and Mansaf are among the most famous traditional foods.

sentences.arabic: تَسْتَخْدِمُ العَائِلَاتُ التَّوَابِلَ العَطِرَةَ لِإِعْطَاءِ الطَّعَامِ نَكْهَةً خَاصَّةً.
sentences.translation: Porodice koriste mirisne začine kako bi hrani dale poseban ukus.
sentences.translationEn: Families use aromatic spices to give the food a special flavor.

sentences.arabic: يَجْتَمِعُ الأَهْلُ حَوْلَ مَائِدَةٍ وَاحِدَةٍ لِتَنَاوُلِ الغَدَاءِ.
sentences.translation: Članovi porodice se okupljaju oko jedne trpeze radi ručka.
sentences.translationEn: Family members gather around one table to have lunch.

sentences.arabic: يُعَبِّرُ الطَّعَامُ عَنِ الهُوِيَّةِ وَالتُّرَاثِ فِي كُلِّ بَلَدٍ.
sentences.translation: Hrana izražava identitet i naslijeđe u svakoj zemlji.
sentences.translationEn: Food expresses the identity and heritage of every country.
